_comment: Add the block inside 'hooks.PostToolUse' in your project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json for global). Merge with any existing PostToolUse hooks — do not replace them.

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == */docs/plans/*.md || "$file" == */docs/architecture.md ]]; then echo "\u26a0  html-artifacts: $file changed — run 'html-artifacts refresh' to update docs/html/"; fi
